query: 哪些基金持有宁德时代，列出前10

args.sql: WITH latest_holding AS (SELECT * FROM fund_holding WHERE stock_name = '宁德时代' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 200) SELECT fh.fund_code AS 基金代码, fh.fund_name AS 基金名称, fh.stock_name AS 股票名称, fh.holding_quantity AS 持仓数量, fh.holding_value AS 持仓市值, s.fund_size AS 基金规模 FROM latest_holding fh JOIN fund_size s ON fh.fund_code = s.fund_code AND fh.date = s.date LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 查询持有宁德时代的最新持仓数据，关联基金规模信息，返回前10条记录
